summary: Iteration 35: Verified 4 new changes - nav pill abbreviations with colors, Cloud Management section moved after DHCP, auto-UDDI selection, auto-deployment model. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Nav pills abbreviated with colors - IPAM (blue), I DNS (green), E DNS (teal), DHCP (orange), Cloud (sky), Services (emerald), MSFT MGT (violet), AI/NI (amber), Security (red), PS (slate) - PASS
2. Cloud Management section appears in Discovery tab after DHCP section - PASS
3. Cloud Management contains Cloudflare management and Akamai management questions - PASS
4. Auto-UDDI selection: Clicking Yes on Cloudflare management auto-enables UDDI target solution - PASS
5. Auto-deployment model: NIOS only → platformMode=NIOS (FO only in DHCP redundancy) - PASS
6. Section collapse/expand with arrow toggle works correctly - PASS
7. Save button works - shows 'Saved - All changes saved successfully' toast - PASS
8. Section order in nav bar: IPAM, I DNS, E DNS, DHCP, Cloud, Services, MSFT MGT, AI/NI, Security, PS - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx: Auto-UDDI selection logic (lines 136-144) correctly triggers when uddi-1 (Cloudflare) or uddi-4 (Akamai) = Yes
TopBar.jsx: Auto-deployment model logic (lines 147-155) correctly sets: NIOS only→NIOS, UDDI only→UDDI, NIOS+(UDDI or Asset)→Hybrid
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: sectionAbbreviations map provides abbreviated names for nav pills
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: sectionPillColors map provides color-coded styles matching section accents
questions.js: Cloud Management questions (uddi-1, uddi-4, uddi-5) correctly moved to section 'Cloud Management'
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features verified: (1) Nav pills abbreviated with section-specific colors - IPAM blue, I DNS green, E DNS teal, DHCP orange, Cloud sky, Services emerald, MSFT MGT violet, AI/NI amber, Security red, PS slate. (2) Cloud Management section appears in Discovery tab after DHCP (section order: IPAM → I DNS → E DNS → DHCP → Cloud Management → Services → MSFT MGT → AI/NI → Security → PS). (3) Auto-UDDI selection - clicking Yes on Cloudflare or Akamai management auto-enables UDDI target solution. (4) Auto-deployment model based on target solutions: NIOS only→NIOS mode (FO only), UDDI only→UDDI mode (AAP/AP/AA), NIOS+(UDDI or Asset)→Hybrid mode (all 4 options). Key data-testids: nav-Cloud-Management, checkbox-dhcp-1-FO, btn-yes-uddi-1.

auto_uddi_selection.trigger: Cloudflare=Yes or Akamai=Yes auto-selects UDDI target

auto_deployment_model.logic: NIOS only→NIOS, UDDI only→UDDI, NIOS+(UDDI or Asset)→Hybrid
